title: The Mysterious Chest
description: A beautifully ornamented chest stands on the ground. There must be something good inside... right?

1.label: Open It
1.labelDisabled: Maybe if you had more Pokemon, but...
1.tooltipDisabled: You need at least two healthy Pokemon to risk opening the chest.
1.selected: You open the chest to find...
1.selectedPlural: You open the chests to find...
1.openBothPrompt: Well, no sense leaving loot behind... right?
1.normal: Just some normal tools and items.
1.good: Some pretty nice tools and items.
1.great: A couple great tools and items!
1.otherNormal: And the other chest has some normal tools and items.
1.otherGood: And the other chest has some pretty nice tools and items.
1.otherGreat: And the other chest has a couple great tools and items!
1.otherAmazing: Whoa! And an amazing item in the other chest!

2.label: Too Risky, Leave
2.selected:
You hurry along your way,
with a slight feeling of regret.
